subcodes.first_line: O beloved! Upon thee be My glory and My peace. Trees are of two kinds: those that bear fruit and those that are barren. The fruitful ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عزیز علیک بهائی و سلامی اشجار دو قسمند قسمی با ثمر و قسمی بی ثمر با ثمر آن
subcodes.subjects: @bringing forth results; fruit, @wisdom [hikmat], @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @prayer for peace and unity, @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
